atoms.docstring_summary: Analyze the spectral gap (algebraic connectivity) of the graph.
Check that the graph Laplacian is symmetric.
Validate that the graph filter response is well-behaved.
Validate that the graph is connected.
Measure how many detected peaks sit near the decision threshold.
review_limitations: Sensitivity is the fraction of finite peak amplitudes within a fixed 10 percent threshold margin.

atoms.docstring_summary: Estimate whether event arrivals remain roughly stationary over time.
review_limitations: Stationarity is approximated with equal-width event-count histogram bins and a coefficient-of-variation cutoff.

atoms.docstring_summary: Estimate the fraction of detections that are suspiciously close to noise.
Estimate signal-to-noise ratio in dB and flag whether it is acceptable.
Mark time windows whose local waveform statistics look unreliable.
review_limitations: Quality is a local excess-kurtosis window mask, not a universal signal-quality index.

atoms.docstring_summary: Convert ordered event indices into midpoint locations and rate values.
Convert event indices into a median-smoothed rate estimate.
review_limitations: Even smoothing windows are rounded down to the nearest odd window before median filtering.

atoms.docstring_summary: Convert event indices into a moving-average-smoothed rate estimate.
review_limitations: Moving-average edge values follow NumPy same-mode convolution behavior.

atoms.docstring_summary: Detect robust event peaks in a conditioned waveform.
review_limitations: Peak polarity is selected by median prominence and is not domain-specific morphology validation.

atoms.docstring_summary: Estimate event locations and a robust event-rate series directly from a raw signal.
review_limitations: End-to-end output is a heuristic event-rate estimate, not a clinically validated heart-rate measurement.
The composed path still uses the conservative internal reject_outlier_intervals helper; the helper itself remains unpublished pending contract repair.

atoms.docstring_summary: Band-limit and clip a waveform before event detection.
Analyze group delay variation across frequency.
review_limitations: Linear phase is determined by finite group-delay range under one sample.

atoms.docstring_summary: Analyze filter stability from pole locations.
Detect startup transient in filter output.
Measure peak-to-peak ripple in the filter passband.
review_limitations: Ripple is a finite-value peak-to-peak measurement over the caller-supplied passband mask.

atoms.docstring_summary: Analyze spectral leakage introduced by the window function.
review_limitations: Leakage is estimated as spectral power outside the dominant one-bin-neighborhood main lobe; it is not a side-lobe envelope measurement.

atoms.docstring_summary: Check round-trip reconstruction quality of forward+inverse transform.
Detect potential aliasing by checking energy near Nyquist.
review_limitations: Aliasing risk is inferred from high-index spectral-bin energy in the provided spectrum representation.

atoms.docstring_summary: Validate energy conservation between time and frequency domains.
Apply FIR bandpass filtering to an ECG waveform.
Detect ECG peaks with the Christov segmenter.
Compute instantaneous heart rate from R-peak indices.
Compute instantaneous heart rate and apply robust median smoothing.
Correct candidate R-peak locations against an ECG signal.
Detect R-peak sample indices from a filtered ECG signal.
Remove event markers that induce implausible adjacent intervals.
Detect ECG peaks with the slope-sum-function segmenter.
Extract heartbeat templates around corrected R-peaks.
Run the ASI ECG segmenter and return detected R-peaks.
Alias the Christov QRS detector under the segmenter naming surface.
Run the Christov QRS detector and return detected R-peaks.
Alias the Engzee detector under the QRS segmentation naming surface.
Run the Engzee detector and return detected R-peaks.
Run the Gamboa detector and return detected R-peaks.
Alias the Gamboa detector under the segmenter naming surface.
Run the Hamilton detector and return detected R-peaks.
Alias the Hamilton detector under the segmenter naming surface.
Run the BioSPPy ASI detector and return R-peak indices.
Calculates a beat-based Signal Quality Index (bSQI) based on the agreement between two beat detectors.
Calculates a composite Signal Quality Index (SQI) for a signal, using multiple detectors and parameters. This likely serves as an orchestrator or a specific implementation from a paper.
Calculates a frequency-based Signal Quality Index (fSQI) using the power spectrum of the electrocardiogram (ECG) signal.
Calculates a Signal Quality Index (kSQI) based on the statistical kurtosis of the signal.
Run the composite ZZ2018 ECG quality classifier.
Compute the detector-agreement SQI from two beat-location streams.
Compute the frequency-domain SQI for an ECG waveform.
Compute the kurtosis-based SQI for an ECG waveform.
Initialize an OnlineFilter coefficient/state bundle for chunked use.
Filter one signal chunk and return the next immutable filter state.
Initialize an OnlineFilter coefficient/state bundle for chunked use.
Filter one signal chunk and return the next immutable filter state.
Initialize an OnlineFilter coefficient/state bundle for chunked use.
Filter one signal chunk and return the next immutable filter state.
Generate a reconstructed PPG waveform through the GAN wrapper surface.
Generate a reconstructed PPG waveform with the upstream GAN model.
Detect heart-cycle boundaries in a PPG waveform.
Alias the upstream heart-cycle detector under a descriptive public name.
Normalize an input numeric array to a standard scale.
Consume prediction and raw signal and return a deterministic result with no persistent state.
review_required_actions: Replace wrapperpredictionsignalcomputation with behavior equivalent to the upstream Kazemi wrapper or narrow its public contract and metadata before publication.
review_limitations: The current implementation only multiplies prediction by raw_signal, while the existing metadata describes the upstream Kazemi peak-detection post-processing routine.
required_actions: Replace wrapperpredictionsignalcomputation with behavior equivalent to the upstream Kazemi wrapper or narrow its public contract and metadata before publication.

atoms.docstring_summary: Normalize an array into the unit interval used by the vendored Kazemi peak wrapper.
Post-process normalized predictions against the raw signal to extract final peak indices.
Generate a reconstructed signal patch from clean photoplethysmography (PPG) context and injected noise using a provided generator on a specified device.
Construct a full reconstructed signal from clean/noisy index partitions, with optional filtering controlled by input flag.
Compute average template-distance and correlation features for beats.
Return the per-sample average-QRS ECG quality trace from NeuroKit2.
Return NeuroKit2's Zhao 2018 ECG quality label for a cleaned ECG trace.
